title: Hut 8 fully commercializes 1 GW Beacon Point campus with second AI lease
excerpt: The 15-year agreement doubles the tenant’s contracted IT capacity to 704 MW, bringing the Texas campus to $19.6 billion in base-term contract value.
content_html:
Hut 8 (NASDAQ: HUT) said Monday that it had completed commercialization of its 1 GW Beacon Point AI data center campus in Nueces County, Texas, after signing a second 352 MW IT lease. The 15-year agreement lifts the existing tenant's contracted capacity at the campus to 704 MW.

That deal brings Beacon Point's campus-level base-term contract value to $19.6 billion. Hut 8 said the campus could be worth $50.2 billion if the tenant exercises its renewal options.

Hut 8's portfolio now includes 949 MW of contracted AI data center capacity, backed by 1,330 MW of utility capacity. The company said that works out to $26.6 billion in aggregate base-term contract value and more than $1.75 billion in average annual net operating income.

Stay ahead of AI infrastructure deals. Get Blockspace in your inbox.

Hut 8 said all contracted capacity is leased to or financially backstopped by investment-grade counterparties. The Beacon Point customer remains undisclosed and is described as the same high-investment-grade tenant that signed the campus's first 352 MW lease in May.

That initial agreement carried a 15-year base term and $9.8 billion in contract value, including a 3% annual base-rent escalator. Hut 8 structured it as a triple-net lease, placing operating expenses such as maintenance and property taxes with the tenant.

The tenant plans to deploy dedicated compute infrastructure for hyperscale AI training and inference. Hut 8 previously said the first lease could generate average annual NOI of $655 million after stabilization, while three five-year renewal options could lift its potential value to approximately $25.1 billion.

Beacon Point's 1 GW designation refers to utility capacity, while the two leases cover 704 MW of critical IT capacity. Hut 8 has an interconnection agreement covering the full 1,000 MW, and the first lease moved 500 MW of utility capacity from development into construction.

Stay ahead of AI infrastructure deals. Get Blockspace in your inbox.

Hut 8 began financing the first phase in June, when subsidiary Beacon Point DC priced $4.25 billion of senior secured notes at 6.129% that mature in 2042. The non-recourse notes are intended to fund six data halls totaling 352 MW of critical IT capacity, along with the site substation and related reserves.

Hut 8 initially underwrote the 521-acre site as a speed-to-power project for affiliated miner American Bitcoin. The company later redirected the site toward AI infrastructure as customer requirements changed and demand for powered data center capacity grew.

content_html_zh:
Hut 8（纳斯达克股票代码：HUT）周一表示，在签署第二份 352 兆瓦 IT 租赁协议后，该公司已完成位于德克萨斯州纽埃西斯县 1 吉瓦 Beacon Point AI 数据中心园区的商业化。 这份为期 15 年的协议将园区现有租户的合同容量提升至 704 兆瓦。

这笔交易使 Beacon Point 校园级基本合同价值达到 196 亿美元。 Hut 8 表示，如果租户行使续约选择权，园区的价值可能高达 502 亿美元。

Hut 8 的投资组合目前包括 949 兆瓦的人工智能数据中心合同容量，并由 1,330 兆瓦的公用事业容量提供支持。 该公司表示，基本期限合同总价值达 266 亿美元，平均年净营业收入超过 17.5 亿美元。

保持领先的人工智能基础设施交易。 在您的收件箱中获取 Blockspace。

Hut 8 表示，所有合同产能均出租给投资级交易对手或由投资级交易对手提供财务支持。 Beacon Point 的客户仍未公开，据称是 5 月份签署该园区首个 352 兆瓦租约的高投资级租户。

最初的协议有 15 年的基本期限和 98 亿美元的合同价值，其中包括每年 3% 的自动扶梯基本租金。 Hut 8 将其构建为三网租赁，将维护费用和财产税等运营费用交给租户。

租户计划部署专用计算基础设施用于超大规模人工智能训练和推理。 Hut 8 此前表示，稳定后第一份租赁可产生平均每年 6.55 亿美元的 NOI，而三个五年续约选项可将其潜在价值提升至约 251 亿美元。

Beacon Point 的 1 GW 指的是公用事业容量，而两项租赁涵盖了 704 MW 的关键 IT 容量。 Hut 8 签订了覆盖全部 1,000 兆瓦的互连协议，第一份租赁将 500 兆瓦的公用设施容量从开发转移到建设中。

保持领先的人工智能基础设施交易。 在您的收件箱中获取 Blockspace。

Hut 8 于 6 月开始第一阶段融资，当时子公司 Beacon Point DC 以 6.129% 的利率定价了 42.5 亿美元的高级担保票据，将于 2042 年到期。 无追索权票据旨在为六个数据大厅（总计 352 MW 的关键 IT 容量）以及站点变电站和相关储备提供资金。

Hut 8 最初承保了这片占地 521 英亩的场地，作为附属矿商 American Bitcoin 的快速发电项目。 随着客户需求的变化和对动力数据中心容量的需求的增长，该公司后来将网站转向人工智能基础设施。
